description: Weak adoption opportunity with vague decisions, low financial impact, and distant value realization
domain: Procure Source & Buy > Commodity Management & Market Intelligence

decision_density.rationale: decision_articulation is vague with no specific triggers or thresholds

financial_gravity.rationale: Mixed financial ratings, mostly LOW; indirect financial impact

impact_proximity.rationale: Only SECOND-order impact; benefits require multi-year technology adoption cycles

confidence_signal.rationale: Mixed confidence with several LOW signals; assessments are speculative

anti_patterns: decision_density should NOT be 3 — articulation is vague
financial_gravity and impact_proximity should NOT both be 3
